fields.name: Bali
fields.description: Bali is a living postcard, an Indonesian paradise that feels like a fantasy. Soak up the sun on a stretch of beach, or commune with nature on a scenic hike. It's a place of lush rice terraces, volcanic mountains, ancient temples and an incredibly rich culture.
fields.highlights: Tanah Lot Temple,Ubud Rice Terraces,Mount Batur,Seminyak Beach,Monkey Forest

fields.name: Santorini
fields.description: Santorini is one of the Cyclades islands in the Aegean Sea. It was devastated by a volcanic eruption in the 16th century BC, forever shaping its rugged landscape. The whitewashed, cubiform houses of its two principal towns, Fira and Oia, cling to cliffs above an underwater caldera.
fields.highlights: Oia Sunset,Caldera Views,Akrotiri Archaeological Site,Black Sand Beaches,Wine Tasting

fields.name: Machu Picchu
fields.description: Machu Picchu is an Incan citadel set high in the Andes Mountains in Peru, above the Urubamba River valley. Built in the 15th century and later abandoned, it's renowned for its sophisticated dry-stone walls that fuse huge blocks without the use of mortar.
fields.highlights: Sun Gate,Huayna Picchu,Inca Trail,Sacred Valley,Aguas Calientes

fields.name: Tokyo
fields.description: Tokyo, Japan's busy capital, mixes the ultramodern and the traditional, from neon-lit skyscrapers to historic temples. The opulent Meiji Shinto Shrine is known for its towering gate and surrounding forest. The Imperial Palace sits amid large public gardens.
fields.highlights: Shibuya Crossing,Senso-ji Temple,Mount Fuji Day Trip,Tsukiji Fish Market,Akihabara
fields.best_time_to_visit: March to May (cherry blossom) or September to November

fields.name: Safari in Serengeti
fields.description: The Serengeti National Park is a large national park in northern Tanzania that spans 14,750 km². It is famous for its annual wildebeest migration, where millions of animals traverse the plains from Tanzania's Serengeti to Kenya's Masai Mara.
fields.highlights: Great Migration,Big Five,Hot Air Balloon Safari,Ngorongoro Crater,Maasai Village
fields.best_time_to_visit: June to October (dry season and migration)

fields.name: New York City
fields.description: New York City comprises 5 boroughs sitting where the Hudson River meets the Atlantic Ocean. At its core is Manhattan, a densely populated borough that's among the world's major commercial, financial and cultural centers. Its iconic sites include skyscrapers such as the Empire State Building and sprawling Central Park.
fields.highlights: Central Park,Statue of Liberty,Times Square,Brooklyn Bridge,Metropolitan Museum
fields.best_time_to_visit: April to June or September to November

fields.title: Bali Cultural Heritage & Temples Tour
fields.description: Immerse yourself in the spiritual heart of Bali with visits to ancient temples, traditional villages, and UNESCO-listed rice terraces. Experience a Kecak fire dance performance and witness the iconic Tanah Lot sunset.
fields.itinerary:
Day 1: Arrive in Denpasar, hotel check-in, welcome dinner
Day 2: Ubud - Sacred Monkey Forest, Tegallalang Rice Terraces
Day 3: Temple Tour - Besakih Mother Temple, Kehen Temple
Day 4: Tanah Lot Sunset, Seminyak Beach
Day 5: Cooking class, spa treatment, departure
fields.includes: 4-star accommodation,Daily breakfast,Airport transfers,Expert guide,Temple entrance fees,Kecak dance show
fields.excludes: International flights,Travel insurance,Personal expenses,Lunch and dinner

fields.title: Bali Volcano & Adventure Trekking
fields.description: Conquer Mount Batur at sunrise, explore hidden waterfalls, and white-water raft through jungle gorges. This action-packed tour combines Bali's dramatic volcanic landscapes with thrilling outdoor adventures.
fields.itinerary:
Day 1: Arrival, gear briefing
Day 2: Mount Batur sunrise trek (4am start)
Day 3: Gitgit Waterfall hike, afternoon rafting
Day 4: ATV ride through rice fields, cliff jump
Day 5: Relaxation day, optional surfing lesson, departure

fields.title: Santorini Sunset & Wine Experience
fields.description: Fall in love with Santorini's iconic blue-domed churches, volcanic beaches, and world-renowned sunsets. Sip local Assyrtiko wine, explore ancient Akrotiri, and sail the caldera on a traditional wooden boat.
fields.itinerary:
Day 1: Arrive Fira, sunset walk
Day 2: Oia village, sunset viewing
Day 3: Caldera sailing tour, swimming stops
Day 4: Akrotiri excavations, wine tasting at volcanic winery
Day 5: Red Beach, departure
fields.includes: Boutique hotel (cave suite),Daily breakfast,Caldera sailing tour,Wine tasting,Airport transfers

fields.title: Classic Inca Trail to Machu Picchu
fields.description: Trek the legendary Inca Trail through cloud forests and high mountain passes to reach the mystical citadel of Machu Picchu at sunrise. One of the world's most iconic hiking experiences, this 4-day trek follows the original Incan route.
fields.itinerary:
Day 1: Cusco acclimatization, Sacred Valley tour
Day 2: Inca Trail start (KM82), camp at Ayapata
Day 3: Dead Woman's Pass (4,215m), Pacaymayo camp
Day 4: Sun Gate, Machu Picchu citadel tour
Day 5: Return to Cusco, farewell dinner
fields.includes: Inca Trail permit,Camping equipment,Cook and guide,Train return,Machu Picchu entrance

fields.title: Tokyo: Modern Japan & Ancient Traditions
fields.description: Experience the electrifying contrast of futuristic Tokyo and Japan's ancient traditions. From the neon-soaked streets of Shibuya to the serene gardens of the Imperial Palace, discover why Tokyo is one of the world's most fascinating cities.
fields.itinerary:
Day 1: Arrival, Shibuya Crossing at night
Day 2: Senso-ji Temple, Asakusa, Akihabara
Day 3: Harajuku, Meiji Shrine, Shinjuku
Day 4: Tsukiji Market, Odaiba, teamLab Planets
Day 5: Day trip to Nikko or Kamakura
Day 6: Imperial Palace, Ginza, departure
fields.includes: 4-star hotel,JR Pass (7 days),Airport transfers,Local guide,teamLab Planets tickets

fields.title: Serengeti Great Migration Safari
fields.description: Witness the greatest wildlife spectacle on Earth — the Great Migration of over 1.5 million wildebeest and zebra across the Serengeti plains. Game drives at dawn and dusk offer incredible predator-prey encounters in their natural habitat.
fields.itinerary:
Day 1: Fly to Arusha, camp briefing
Day 2-3: Central Serengeti, predator game drives
Day 4: Northern Serengeti, migration river crossing
Day 5: Ngorongoro Crater full-day tour
Day 6: Maasai village visit, depart Arusha
Day 7: Return home
fields.includes: Luxury tented camp,All meals,Game drives (4x4),Park fees,Ngorongoro fees,Internal flights
